AI-Powered Personality Assessment

Your personality, decoded by AI.

Prof. Filer brings personality discovery into the age of artificial intelligence. Using a completely AI-driven process, it evaluates how you think, decide and connect. And then translates that into one of 16 distinctive personality profiles. Each profile sits within an intuitive four-quadrant grid, showing how your 1. energy, 2. processing, 3. decision-making, and 4. approach shape the way you work and relate to others.

Take the QuizLearn More

Who is the who in you?

Prof. Filer is an expert at assessing personalities and making recommendations for successfully optimising each person’s unique traits and abilities. And he does this in a way that only AI can: no mess, no fuss.

Good-bye questionnaires!

Forget the endless 80-question tests. Prof. Filer’s quick-fire 10+3 format keeps things simple: answer ten smart questions, upload three short documents — that’s it. (These are encrypted and Cloud-processed, and are never stored anywhere).

🎯

10 smart questions

Ten carefully crafted questions that reveal how you really think and operate.

📄

3 short documents

Upload three documents that reflect your writing style — reports, proposals, analyses, prose, etc.

✨

Instant profile

You’ll instantly receive a free personality snapshot (and a customised report exploring your natural strengths, challenges and growth zones can be unlocked for a small fee thereafter if you’re curious to know more).

The methodology

Built on a framework inspired by the well-known four-letter personality system originally introduced by Myers and Briggs, Prof. Filer delivers clarity and simplicity — reimagined with the precision, speed and insight only AI can provide (and without the long, boring questionnaires).

Personality Assessment Variables

Built on a framework inspired by the well-known four-letter personality system originally introduced by Myers and Briggs, Prof. Filer delivers clarity and simplicity — reimagined with the precision, speed and insight only AI can provide (and without the long, boring questionnaires).

The Methodology

Familiar format. AI precision.

The Prof. Filer assessment uses a refined interpretation of the Myers-Briggs (MBTI) type framework. It is designed to explore how people gain energy, process information, make decisions, and approach the world.

It keeps the clarity and accessibility of the familiar four-letter format while re-imagining it through AI to deliver faster, more intuitive and personalized insights. Once this is plotted, it gives strong insights into how decisions are made, relationships are formed (and maintained) and how one operates in the workplace.

Read the Methodology →

The Methodology

The Methodology

The Prof. Filer assessment uses a refined interpretation of the Myers-Briggs (MBTI) type framework. It is designed to explore how people gain energy, process information, make decisions, and approach the world.

The Prof. Filer assessment uses a refined interpretation of the Myers-Briggs (MBTI) type framework. It is designed to explore how people gain energy, process information, make decisions, and approach the world.

It keeps the clarity and accessibility of the familiar four-letter format while re-imagining it through AI to deliver faster, more intuitive and personalized insights. Once this is plotted, it gives strong insights into how decisions are made, relationships are formed (and maintained) and how one operates in the workplace.

The original MBTI framework, that inspired Prof. Filer, maps personality across four key axes — Energy (Extraversion–Introversion (E or I)), Information (Sensing–Intuition (S or N)), Decision-Making (Thinking–Feeling (T or F)), and Approach (Judging–Perceiving (J or P)) — revealing how individuals naturally interact with the world. This sorts personalities into 16 different character types.

All 16 types

Each of the 16 personality types emerges from a unique combination of the four axes.

TypeProfileCore Traits
INTJThe ArchitectStrategic, independent, determined, private
INTPThe LogicianAnalytical, objective, reserved, flexible
ENTJThe CommanderBold, decisive, strategic, driven
ENTPThe DebaterInnovative, quick-witted, outspoken, resourceful
INFJThe AdvocateInsightful, principled, compassionate, private
INFPThe MediatorIdealistic, empathetic, creative, reserved
ENFJThe ProtagonistCharismatic, empathetic, organised, diplomatic
ENFPThe CampaignerEnthusiastic, creative, sociable, free-spirited
ISTJThe LogisticianResponsible, thorough, dependable, traditional
ISFJThe DefenderSupportive, reliable, patient, observant
ESTJThe ExecutiveOrganised, loyal, direct, strong-willed
ESFJThe ConsulCaring, sociable, dutiful, popular
ISTPThe VirtuosoObservant, practical, direct, private
ISFPThe AdventurerFlexible, charming, sensitive, curious
ESTPThe EntrepreneurEnergetic, perceptive, direct, sociable
ESFPThe EntertainerSpontaneous, energetic, enthusiastic, playful

Find your type.

10 questions. Under 5 minutes. No endless questionnaires.
